summary: Attempt 6 passes all focused checks and improves standalone/core parity, but the authoritative whole-target verdict remains ADDITIONAL_WORK_NEEDED due to the missing real resolver readiness canary, capability mismatch alert path, and replay/production rollout fixtures.

remainingWork.requirement: Readiness canary and deployment boundary coverage
remainingWork.remainingWork: Gate resolver readiness on a harmless real parent-child canary tied to queue, build/deployment identity, and registry fingerprint.
remainingWork.suggestedEvidence: Canary implementation and Temporal parent-child boundary tests

remainingWork.remainingWork: Add fleet aggregation and operator alerting for repeated registration or child-start capability mismatch.
remainingWork.suggestedEvidence: Failure classification, metrics/alerts, operator projection, and tests

remainingWork.requirement: Replay and production rollout regression coverage
remainingWork.remainingWork: Add Temporal replay and deployed-entrypoint/Compose tests for restart, budgets, fingerprint stability, rollout, and stale-worker exclusion.

testResults.notes: Focused suite: 398 passed and 2 subtests passed in 9.66 seconds.
Broad Compose integration cannot supply the absent resolver-specific canary, replay, and rollout fixtures.
